subcodes.first_line: O Ardashir, loving friend! Ardashir the renowned restored the kingship of Iran and once again the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اردشیرا یار مهربانا اردشیر شهیر پادشاهی ایران را تجدید نمود و دوباره سریر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @past, present and future of Iran, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
